title: Solana Agent DeFi Navigator
description: Pull real-time Jupiter-aggregated route data and Raydium/Orca pool metrics via GoldRush to give an AI agent the swap intelligence it needs: best output amount, price impact, pool liquidity depth, and fee tier — all in one structured call. Feed this into an agent's decision loop to autonomously execute optimal swaps on Solana — if price impact exceeds threshold, hold; otherwise sign and submit.
useCase: Build an autonomous Solana DeFi agent that evaluates swap routes, checks price impact and pool liquidity, and executes trades only when conditions meet a configurable risk threshold.

keyParams.address: Agent wallet address to check balances and transaction history
keyParams.inputMint: SPL token mint address being sold in the swap
keyParams.outputMint: SPL token mint address being bought in the swap
keyParams.maxPriceImpactPct: Maximum acceptable price impact before blocking the swap
keyParams.page_size: Number of recent transactions to analyze for context
